title: Rajeev Motwani's Contributions to Theoretical Computer Science
description: A conceptual diagram highlighting key research areas and contributions by Rajeev Motwani within the Theory of Computation.
relationships: Pioneering work on Randomized Algorithms (e.g., the book 'Randomized Algorithms') led to foundational techniques used in Data Stream Algorithms and influenced research in Privacy-Preserving Data Mining and Algorithmic Game Theory.
